title: Plan and implement a pasture establishment program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and implement a pasture establishment program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine requirements for pasture establishment program

pcs.text: Assess pasture site for current condition and suitability for replacement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess pasture site for current condition and suitability for replacement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess pasture site for current condition and suitability for replacement.

pcs.text: Identify pasture species and cultivars suitable to soil, climate, seasonal conditions and livestock goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify pasture species and cultivars suitable to soil, climate, seasonal conditions and livestock goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify pasture species and cultivars suitable to soil, climate, seasonal conditions and livestock goals.

pcs.text: Identify and select pasture establishment procedures consistent with site parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select pasture establishment procedures consistent with site parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select pasture establishment procedures consistent with site parameters.

pcs.text: Assess and program equipment and technologies to ensure most efficient performance of operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and program equipment and technologies to ensure most efficient performance of operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and program equipment and technologies to ensure most efficient performance of operations.

pcs.text: Determine post-planting care according to production needs, enterprise standards and site capabilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine post-planting care according to production needs, enterprise standards and site capabilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine post-planting care according to production needs, enterprise standards and site capabilities.

pcs.text: Identify and assess plant germination and nutrient requirements according to soil characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess plant germination and nutrient requirements according to soil characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess plant germination and nutrient requirements according to soil characteristics.

pcs.text: Identify, cost and confirm availability of materials and resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, cost and confirm availability of materials and resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, cost and confirm availability of materials and resources.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and develop controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and develop controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and develop controls.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop on-site planting procedures and schedules.

pcs.text: Develop post-planting procedures for pasture care
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop post-planting procedures for pasture care?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop post-planting procedures for pasture care.

pcs.text: Plan for contingencies and identify alternative strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan for contingencies and identify alternative strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan for contingencies and identify alternative strategies.
